name: linux-admin
description: Senior Linux administrator and SRE workflow as a Claude Code plugin. Covers 106 task-specific skills for boot, networking, storage, load balancing, web proxies, enterprise ADCs, Linux L4 balancing, DNS traffic steering, cloud load balancers, kernel, auth, logging, databases, web servers, backup/restore, incident response, defensive security validation, security scoring, patching, SELinux, AppArmor, capacity planning, and production safety.
